overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Your indie hacker control center
overview.addServices: Go to a project to add probes
overview.serviceAlert: Some services are unreachable — check immediately

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Set MRR, revenue, and time targets — track progress in real time
goals.empty: No goals yet. Set your first target.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Unified project registry
projects.noProjectsDesc: Add your first project to start tracking status, revenue, and time investment.

share.desc: Anyone with this link can view the project's public page (revenue, time, status).
share.revokeConfirm: Revoke this share link? The current URL will stop working.

projects.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All project data (services, revenue, time logs) will be permanently deleted.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.subtitle: MRR & revenue tracking
revenue.noEntriesDesc: Start logging revenue for your projects.

time.title: Time
time.subtitle: Attention & time tracking
time.noLogsDesc: Start logging time spent on your projects.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Integrations & service status
services.noIntegrationsDesc: Add GitHub, Vercel and other integrations from each project's detail page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Global configuration & API Keys
settings.githubTokenDesc: Used to access repo info, CI status, and commit history. Requires repo and workflow scopes.
settings.vercelTokenDesc: Used to fetch deployment status and project info.

digest.title: Weekly Email Digest
digest.desc: Automatically send a weekly revenue, time, and service health summary to your inbox. Uses Resend — free tier is 3,000 emails/month.
digest.cronTip: Add POST /api/digest to your cron schedule to send automatically (e.g. every Monday at 8:00 AM).

notify.title: Down Alerts
notify.desc: Get notified when an HTTP probe detects a service is down. Supports Slack, Discord, Telegram, and generic webhooks.
notify.webhookDesc: Compatible with Slack Incoming Webhooks, Discord Webhooks, and any endpoint that accepts a JSON POST.
notify.telegramDesc: Create a bot via @BotFather to get a token. Add the bot to your group or DM it to get the Chat ID.

settings.stripeSecretKeyDesc: Used to fetch MRR, subscriptions, and revenue. Use a Restricted Key with read-only permissions for security.
settings.revenuecatSecretKeyDesc: Used to fetch App Store / Play Store in-app purchase MRR and subscription data. Find it in RevenueCat dashboard → API Keys.
settings.lemonsqueezyApiKeyDesc: Used to fetch MRR and subscription data. Supports SaaS and digital product sales with built-in tax handling. Find it in Lemon Squeezy → Settings → API.
settings.paddleApiKeyDesc: Used to fetch MRR and subscription data. Supports subscription SaaS with built-in tax handling. Find it in Paddle dashboard → Developer Tools → Authentication.
settings.stripeWebhookSecretDesc: Get this from Stripe → Webhooks after adding the endpoint. Used to verify real-time payment events. Webhook URL:
settings.plausibleApiKeyDesc: Create one in Plausible → Settings → API Keys. Used to read traffic stats.

portfolio.title: Public Portfolio Page
portfolio.desc: Showcase all your projects on a public page. Great for build-in-public sharing.

changelog.title: Public Changelog Page
changelog.desc: Auto-generated changelog from your project milestones, grouped by month. Great for sharing product progress.

settings.openaiApiKeyDesc: Powers the AI Copilot. Uses gpt-4o-mini — very low cost per analysis.

statusPage.title: Public Status Page
statusPage.desc: Share this URL so users can check the real-time health of all your HTTP-monitored services. No login required. Regenerating the token invalidates the old link.
statusPage.urlDesc: This URL contains a token — share it with your users or link it in your product docs.

cron.title: Auto-sync (Cron)
cron.desc: Add the URL below to any cron service (e.g. cron-job.org). Each hit automatically syncs all your integrations.
cron.urlDesc: The URL includes a secret token. Do not share it publicly.
cron.step2: Paste the URL above and choose a frequency (every 30 min or 1 hour recommended)
cron.step3: Save — your integrations will sync automatically from now on

settings.danger: Note: API Keys are stored in plain text in your local database. Make sure your indie-os instance is not publicly accessible.

ai.title: AI Copilot
ai.noKey: Add an OpenAI API Key in Settings to enable AI Copilot.
ai.prompt: Click "Generate Insights" to get AI-powered recommendations based on your real data.

stripe.addDesc: Uses the Stripe Secret Key from Settings. MRR is automatically logged to your revenue records on each sync.

kpi.title: Custom KPIs
kpi.empty: No custom metrics yet. Add DAU, signups, or any data you care about.
kpi.deleteConfirm: Delete this metric and all its historical data?

form.name: Metric name
form.examples: Examples: DAU (users), Conversion rate (%), Newsletter subscribers (people), App Store rating (stars)

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.empty: No milestones yet. Record your first important moment.

form.title: Title
form.titlePlaceholder: First paying customer, $1000 MRR, Product launch...

csvImport.title: CSV Bulk Import
csvImport.desc: Import historical revenue or time data from a CSV file. The first row must contain column names.
csvImport.clickToUpload: Click to select a CSV file

paddle.addDesc: Uses the Paddle API Key from Settings to pull subscription data. MRR is automatically logged to revenue on each sync.

lemonsqueezy.addDesc: Uses the Lemon Squeezy API Key from Settings to pull subscription data. MRR is automatically logged to revenue on each sync.
lemonsqueezy.storeIdHint: Find your Store ID in Lemon Squeezy → Stores. Leave blank to fetch data across all stores in your account.

revenuecat.addDesc: Uses the RevenueCat Secret Key from Settings to pull mobile in-app purchase data. MRR is automatically logged to revenue on each sync.
revenuecat.projectIdHint: Find it in the RevenueCat dashboard URL: app.revenuecat.com/projects/{projectId}

plausible.addDesc: Enter your Plausible site domain (Site ID). Make sure to add your Plausible API Key in Settings.
plausible.baseUrlHint: Leave empty to use plausible.io. Fill in the full URL for self-hosted instances.

reports.title: Analytics Reports
reports.subtitle: Multi-dimensional analysis of time investment and revenue

forecast.title: MRR Forecast
forecast.notEnoughData: At least 2 months of MRR data are needed to generate a forecast.
forecast.disclaimer: Forecast is based on average month-over-month growth from the last 6 months and is for reference only.

appstore.addDesc: Enter the numeric App Store App ID (found in the App Store URL or App Store Connect). No API key required.

notes.title: Project Notes
notes.placeholder: Jot down ideas, progress, issues… Markdown is supported.
notes.autosave: Auto-saved 1.2 s after you stop typing
